(the live demo or current index.html). For SECURITY issues, do NOT use
this template — see SECURITY.md.
-->

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Provide this input (GitHub URL / zip / files) '...'
3. Click on '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / console output

If applicable, add screenshots and any errors from the browser console
(open DevTools → Console).

```
paste console output here
```
